title: Implement Kanban Board UI with Drag and Drop
description: Build the visual Kanban board using SwiftUI. Horizontal scroll of columns, vertical scroll of cards within columns. Implement native drag and drop for cards between columns. Style with Rick Terminal theme colors.
agent_output:
**KanbanCardView.swift**
- Added `import UniformTypeIdentifiers` and `UTType.kanbanCard` extension
- Added `onDragStarted: ((KanbanCard) -> Void)?` callback
- Added `@State private var isDragging` state
- Added `.onDrag { }` modifier: encodes `card.id.uuidString` as `NSItemProvider`, calls `onDragStarted`, sets `isDragging = true`
- Card fades to 50% opacity and scales to 0.97 during drag; border turns purple
